title: Get started
excerpt: description: Create and deploy your first Pages Function on Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. This guide will instruct you on creating and deploying a Pages Function. You must have a Pages project set up on your local machine or deployed on the Cloudflare dashboard. To create a Pages project, refer to [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/get-started/).
